default.headline: Simple tools that make running a small business less painful.
default.subheadline: We're building a suite of lightweight, affordable tools for small business owners. No complexity, no long contracts. Just things that work.
benefits: Set up in under 10 minutes — no technical knowledge needed
Priced for small businesses, not enterprise budgets

menu.headline: Update your menu anytime. Your QR code never changes.
menu.subheadline: Stop reprinting table cards every time your menu changes. Upload a new PDF and your existing QR code updates instantly — no new stickers, no reprinting.
benefits: Change your menu from your phone in under 30 seconds
One QR code works forever — update the PDF behind it anytime
Works with any QR code card or sticker you already have

reminders.headline: Stop losing money to no-shows. Send an automatic reminder SMS.
reminders.subheadline: Paste a client's number and appointment time — we send a reminder SMS automatically. No app for your clients to download, no complicated setup.
benefits: Takes 10 seconds to schedule a reminder from any device
Clients reply to confirm or cancel — you get notified instantly
Pays for itself the first time it prevents a no-show

reviews.headline: One SMS after the job. More Google reviews. More new customers.
reviews.subheadline: After you finish a job, send one SMS asking for a Google review. Sent at exactly the right moment — when the client is happiest.
benefits: Send a review request in 2 taps — no copy-pasting links
Automated follow-up if they don't reply the first time
One extra review per week can bring 3–5 new customers per month

waivers.headline: Ditch the paper waivers. Get signed digitally in seconds.
waivers.subheadline: Send a waiver link before the activity. Clients sign on their phone in under a minute. Signed PDFs stored automatically — no DocuSign complexity, no minimums.
benefits: Client signs on their phone before they arrive — no paper, no printer
Signed PDFs stored automatically and searchable by name or date
Setup takes one afternoon — your first waiver goes out the same day

gift-cards.headline: Sell gift cards from your phone. No POS system needed.
gift-cards.subheadline: Customers pay online and get a branded gift card PDF by email. You get the money instantly. No hardware, no monthly fees beyond the subscription.
benefits: Customers buy online and receive a gift card PDF in seconds
You receive the payment directly — no delays, no middlemen
Set up your gift card page in under 15 minutes
